cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    og.goods_sn AS `商品货号`,
    og.goods_name AS `商品名`,
    SUM(og.share_payment) AS `销售额`,
    SUM(og.goods_number) AS `销量`
FROM order_goods og
INNER JOIN order_info oi ON og.order_id = oi.order_id
WHERE oi.pay_time >= '2026-02-01' AND oi.pay_time < '2026-03-01'
GROUP BY og.goods_sn, og.goods_name
cases.sql_expected: select og.goods_sn 商品货号,og.goods_name 商品名,sum(og.share_payment) 销售额,sum(og.goods_number) 销量 from order_info oi join order_goods og on oi.order_sn=og.order_sn where oi.pay_time>='2026-02-01 00:00:00' group by og.goods_sn,og.goods_name

cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    oi.order_sn,
    oi.deal_code,
    oi.pay_time,
    oi.shipping_time_ck,
    kh.khmc,
    ck.ckmc
FROM order_info oi
LEFT JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id
LEFT JOIN cangku ck ON oi.fhck_id = ck.Id
WHERE oi.order_sn = '126022652882480'
cases.sql_expected: SELECT oi.order_sn, oi.deal_code, oi.pay_time, oi.shipping_time_ck, kh.khmc AS shop_name, ck.ckmc AS shipping_warehouse_name FROM order_info oi JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id JOIN cangku ck ON oi.fhck_id = ck.Id WHERE oi.order_sn = '126022652882480'

cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    k.khmc AS `店铺名称`,
    SUM(og.goods_number) AS `总销量`,
    SUM(og.share_payment) AS `总销售额`
FROM order_info oi
JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id
JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id
WHERE oi.pay_time >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00' 
    AND oi.pay_time < '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
GROUP BY k.Id, k.khmc
cases.sql_expected: SELECT k.khmc AS 店铺名称, SUM(og.goods_number) AS 总销量, SUM(og.share_payment) AS 总销售额 FROM order_info oi JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id WHERE oi.pay_time >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00' AND oi.pay_time < '2026-04-01 00:00:00' GROUP BY k.khmc ORDER BY 总销售额 DESC

cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    oi.order_sn AS '订单号',
    og.goods_sn AS '货号',
    og.goods_name AS '商品名称',
    og.goods_number AS '数量',
    og.share_payment AS '金额'
FROM order_info oi
INNER JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_sn = og.order_sn
INNER JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id
WHERE 
    k.khmc = '爱库存店'
    AND YEAR(oi.pay_time) = YEAR(CURDATE())
    AND MONTH(oi.pay_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
cases.sql_expected: SELECT oi.order_sn AS '订单号', og.goods_sn AS '货号', og.goods_name AS '商品名称', og.goods_number AS '数量', og.share_payment AS '金额' FROM order_info oi INNER JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id INNER JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id WHERE k.khmc = '爱库存店' AND DATE_FORMAT(oi.pay_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

cases.sql_generated:
SELECT
    k.khmc AS `店铺`,
    og.goods_sn AS `货号`,
    SUM(og.goods_number) AS `销售数量`,
    SUM(og.share_payment) AS `销售金额`
FROM order_info oi
INNER JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id
INNER JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id
WHERE YEAR(oi.pay_time) = 2026
GROUP BY k.khmc, og.goods_sn
ORDER BY k.khmc, og.goods_sn
cases.sql_expected: SELECT k.khmc AS `店铺`, og.goods_sn AS `货号`, SUM(og.goods_number) AS `销售数量`, SUM(og.share_payment) AS `销售金额` FROM order_info oi JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_sn = og.order_sn AND oi.deal_code = og.deal_code JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id WHERE YEAR(oi.pay_time) = 2026 GROUP BY k.khmc, og.goods_sn ORDER BY k.khmc, og.goods_sn

cases.sql_generated:
SELECT ck.ckmc AS 仓库名, SUM(og.goods_number) AS 数量
FROM order_info oi
JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id
JOIN cangku ck ON oi.fhck_id = ck.Id
JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id
WHERE kh.khmc = '爱库存店'
  AND oi.shipping_time_ck >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND oi.shipping_time_ck < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
GROUP BY ck.Id, ck.ckmc
ORDER BY 数量 DESC
cases.sql_expected: SELECT ck.ckmc AS `仓库名`, SUM(og.goods_number) AS `数量` FROM order_info oi JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id JOIN cangku ck ON oi.fhck_id = ck.Id JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id WHERE kh.khmc = '爱库存店' AND DATE_FORMAT(oi.shipping_time_ck, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY ck.Id, ck.ckmc ORDER BY `数量` DESC

cases.sql_generated:
SELECT 
    oi.order_sn AS '订单号',
    kh.khmc AS '店铺',
    og.goods_sn AS '货号',
    og.goods_number AS '数量',
    og.share_payment AS '金额'
FROM order_info oi
JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_sn = og.order_sn
JOIN kehu kh ON oi.sd_id = kh.Id
WHERE 
    DATE_FORMAT(oi.pay_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
    AND oi.order_sn IN (
        SELECT order_sn 
        FROM order_goods 
        GROUP BY order_sn 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
ORDER BY oi.order_sn, og.goods_sn
cases.sql_expected: SELECT oi.order_sn AS '订单号', k.khmc AS '店铺', og.goods_sn AS '货号', og.goods_number AS '数量', og.share_payment AS '金额' FROM order_info oi JOIN order_goods og ON oi.order_id = og.order_id JOIN kehu k ON oi.sd_id = k.Id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(oi.pay_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') AND oi.order_id IN ( SELECT order_id FROM order_goods GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) ORDER BY oi.order_sn, og.goods_sn
